name: Intezer Analyze
description: Intezer Analyze provides genetic malware analysis using code DNA mapping to identify code reuse, classify malware families, and detect threats through unique code similarity technology

actions.name: Get Access Token
actions.description: Authenticate with the Intezer API and obtain a JWT access token for subsequent requests

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Your Intezer Analyze API key

actions.name: Analyze File
actions.description: Submit a file for Intezer genetic code analysis including code reuse detection and malware classification

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to analyze (multipart form data)

parameters.name: code_item_type
parameters.description: Type of code item: file, memory_module

parameters.name: disable_dynamic_execution
parameters.description: Skip dynamic (sandbox) execution and only perform static analysis

parameters.name: disable_static_extraction
parameters.description: Skip static extraction phase

parameters.name: zip_password
parameters.description: Password for ZIP-protected files

actions.name: Analyze by Hash
actions.description: Submit a SHA256 hash for analysis. If the file is known, returns existing results; otherwise queues it for analysis

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to analyze

actions.name: Analyze URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for Intezer analysis including page behavior and downloaded content scanning

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to analyze

actions.name: Get Analysis
actions.description: Retrieve the status and results of a file analysis including verdict, malware family, and code reuse findings

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: Analysis ID returned from the analyze endpoint

actions.name: Get URL Analysis
actions.description: Retrieve the results of a URL analysis

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: URL analysis ID returned from the URL submission

actions.name: Get Sub-Analyses
actions.description: Retrieve child/sub-analyses for a parent file analysis (e.g., embedded files, dropped payloads)

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: Parent analysis ID

actions.name: Get Code Reuse
actions.description: Retrieve detailed code reuse analysis showing genetic similarity to known malware families and trusted software

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: Parent analysis ID

parameters.name: sub_analysis_id
parameters.description: Sub-analysis ID (use 'root' for the main file)

actions.name: Get Metadata
actions.description: Retrieve file metadata including PE headers, imports, sections, and other file-format-specific details

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: Parent analysis ID

parameters.name: sub_analysis_id
parameters.description: Sub-analysis ID (use 'root' for the main file)

actions.name: Get Latest Analysis by Hash
actions.description: Retrieve the most recent analysis results for a file by its SHA256 hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file

actions.name: Index File
actions.description: Index a file in your organization's private Genome Database as trusted or malicious for future detection

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File to index (multipart form data)

parameters.name: index_as
parameters.description: Classification for the file: trusted or malicious

parameters.name: family_name
parameters.description: Malware family name (required if index_as is malicious)

actions.name: Get Analysis History
actions.description: Query the history of file analyses for your account with optional filters

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: verdicts
parameters.description: Comma-separated verdicts to filter by (e.g., malicious, suspicious, trusted, unknown)
